title: anthemis cretica var. subcinerea
intro: Anthemis cretica var. subcinerea, also known as a variety of the Anthemis cretica plant, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anthemis cretica var. subcinerea include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate headaches, as well as its potential to act as an antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of Anthemis cretica var. subcinerea may include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
